name: Do I need a lawyer for my work sickness comp claim in Utah?
description: Recommended for illnesses; contingency fee basis.[6]

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer for my work sickness comp claim in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Recommended for illnesses; contingency fee basis.[6]
acceptedAnswer.description: Not required but strongly advised for denials, complex illnesses, max benefits.[6] Self-filing risks mistakes.[2] Key factors: Occupational disease proof, appeals needed. Lawyers work contingency, no upfront fees; boosts success odds significantly.
